description_long: This object is a stylized flower with a bowl-like shape, featuring numerous upright, angular petals in a muted purple color. The petals are arranged in a dense, radial pattern, forming a layered structure that gives the flower a full, robust appearance. Surrounding the base of the petals are several elongated, green leaves that splay outward, adding contrast and visual interest. The petals appear to be thick and slightly irregular, with some overlapping and varying in height. There is no visible stem, and the flower sits low to the ground, suggesting a basal or ground-level growth habit. The overall form is geometric and abstract, with a modern, almost sculptural quality.
description: A stylized, bowl-shaped purple flower with upright, angular petals and outward-splaying green leaves. The petals are densely packed in a radial arrangement, giving the flower a full and layered look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open, bowl-like structure with upright purple petals and green leaves radiating outward at the base.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the dense layering of petals and the way the green leaves fan out more prominently on the right side.
description_view_2: The petals appear more staggered and overlapping, with the green leaves visible beneath the flower's edge.
description_view_3: A side view emphasizing the low, wide profile of the flower and the spread of the green leaves around the base.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a dense, radial pattern with clear layering and overlapping, forming a whorled configuration typical of many ornamental flowers.
